Incognidium Browser Engine

A custom HTML/CSS rendering engine written in Rust.

Features

HTML5 Parsing

Full HTML5 parsing via html5ever.

CSS Styling

Selector matching, cascade, inheritance.

Layout Engine

Block, inline, and flexbox layout.

This page is rendered entirely by Incognidium!

Color Test

This text should be red.

This text should be blue.

This text should be green.

This text should be bigger (24px).

Nested Elements

A div with inline styles: gray background, padding, and border.

Nested div inside the gray one.
